metadata.title: San Diego Events for Children Ages 0-5

events.name: Underwater Egg Hunt at The Plunge
events.description: Shallow end (2.5-3 ft, heated to 85°F) filled with floating and sunken eggs. Kids collect eggs by age group, turn them in for prizes, then enjoy the giant floating obstacle course.

events.name: Steve Taylor Ventriloquist & Magic Show
events.location: Marie Hitchcock Puppet Theater, Balboa Park
events.description: Family-friendly comedy, ventriloquism, and magic show for ages 3 and up.

events.name: Free Community Egg Hunt - Robb Athletic Field
events.description: Free community egg hunt. Eggs go fast — arrive early!

events.name: Free Community Egg Hunt - Pacific Beach Recreation Center
events.description: Free community egg hunt with age-separated fields.

events.name: Frosted Faces Foundation Event at Children's Discovery Museum
events.location: San Diego Children's Discovery Museum, Escondido
events.description: Live presentation, meet & greet, storytime, and a special craft with Frosted Faces Foundation.

events.name: Easter Eggspress at SD Model Railroad Museum
events.location: San Diego Model Railroad Museum, Balboa Park
events.description: Easter eggs and model trains in Balboa Park. Pair it with other park activities the same morning.

events.name: Spring Egg Hunt at Mountain View Community Center
events.location: Mountain View Community Center, Logan Heights
events.description: Spring egg hunt with activities for young children.

events.name: Free Community Egg Hunt - Santee Town Center
events.description: Free community egg hunt. Arrive early as eggs go fast.

events.name: Easter Train at Pacific Southwest Railway Museum
events.description: 45-minute train ride through backcountry in restored 1920s rail cars decorated for Easter, plus egg hunt and Easter Bunny photos at the station.

events.name: SeaWorld Easter Celebration
events.description: Rides, stage shows, Sesame Street Party Parade, Easter Bunny photos, egg scavenger hunt, and Furry Friends Bunny Hop Dance Party.
events.cost: Park admission (FREE Preschool Fun Card for ages 3-5, first 10,000)

events.name: Easter Egg Hunt at Hotel del Coronado
events.description: Easter brunch, beach egg hunts, Garden Fair, Easter Bunny photos, petting zoo, pony rides, face painting, and balloon art.

events.name: Free Community Egg Hunt - Encinitas Community Park
events.description: Free community egg hunt.

events.name: Free Community Egg Hunt - Poinsettia Community Park
events.description: Free community egg hunt.

events.name: Makers Arcade Spring Fair
events.description: Vibrant open-air handmade festival with local artisans. Family-friendly atmosphere.

events.name: SAPLINGS Program at San Diego Botanic Garden
events.location: Hamilton Children's Garden, San Diego Botanic Garden, Encinitas
events.description: Drop-in family program supporting early childhood connections to nature through play and seasonal activities. Spring/Summer theme: 'Birds, bees, and butterflies.' Caregivers stay and play with children.

events.name: Grandma Kathy's Tales & Tunes
events.description: Puppet show and singalong every Friday at the Botanic Garden.

events.name: Food Waste Fridays at San Diego Botanic Garden
events.description: Weekly Learning Labs with hands-on lessons in partnership with Solana Center for Environmental Innovation.

events.name: San Diego County Library - Baby Storytime & Playtime
events.location: Various San Diego County Library branches
events.description: Storytime followed by playtime with shakers, sensory balls, and blocks for ages 0-18 months.

events.name: San Diego County Library - Toddler Storytime
events.location: Various San Diego County Library branches
events.description: Lively songs, movements, and captivating picture books, with hands-on learning and crafting afterward.

events.name: San Diego County Library - Bilingual Preschool Storytime
events.location: Various San Diego County Library branches
events.description: Stories and songs in English and Spanish for preschool-aged children.

events.name: San Diego County Library - Wednesday Storytimes
events.location: Various San Diego County Library branches
events.description: Sing, dance, and hear stories geared toward children ages 0-5.

events.name: Storytime with Seadragons at Birch Aquarium
events.description: Interactive storytime experience at the aquarium, perfect for young ocean enthusiasts. Aquarium also features hands-on exhibits and Little Blue Penguins.

events.name: Toddler Time at The New Children's Museum
events.location: The New Children's Museum, Downtown San Diego
events.description: Structured play and early learning opportunities with hands-on art workshops and interactive installations. Museums for All: $3 admission available.
events.cost: Museum admission ($3 via Museums for All)

events.name: Backyard Play Space at SD Natural History Museum
events.location: San Diego Natural History Museum, Balboa Park
events.description: Dedicated play space designed for children ages 0-5 with interactive nature-themed exhibits.

events.name: Storytime at San Diego Museum of Art Library
events.location: San Diego Museum of Art, Balboa Park
events.description: Lively storytelling and readings of art-inspired children's books. Each storytime features a theme inspired by the SDMA collection.

events.name: Little Mess Club - Creative Play for Toddlers
events.description: Creative sensory play sessions designed for toddlers.

events.name: Trail Tykes: A Program for Little Explorers
events.description: Outdoor exploration program designed for toddlers and young children.

events.name: Early Start Together: Parent-to-Parent Playdates
events.description: Structured playdates connecting parents and their young children for socialization.

events.name: Sunday Art Club: A Monthly Family Art Morning
events.description: Monthly family art morning for ages 1-10. Creative activities suitable for toddlers through older kids.

events.name: Tide Pooling at Cabrillo National Monument
events.date: Ongoing (best through March during low tides)
events.description: Low tides reveal marine life like sea stars, anemones, and hermit crabs. Best for young explorers during winter-spring months.

events.name: San Diego Children's Discovery Museum - Spring Camp
events.location: San Diego Children's Discovery Museum, Escondido
events.description: Spring camp for creative and curious problem solvers to spend spring break exploring with the museum. Programs include song, music, movement, storytime, sensory exploration, and hands-on crafts.
